title: WidgetTheme
description: A community-submitted theme that overrides appearance fields and optional CSS for a single widget type.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Always 1 for this contract version.

widgetType.description: The widget surface this theme targets. Must match a known WidgetType.

name.description: Display name shown in the catalog grid.

author.description: Contributor's handle (GitHub username or agreed alias).

description.description: One-line description of the theme's intent.

previewImage.description: Relative path to the preview PNG within the theme directory. Required. Max 512KB.

fields.description: Partial widget config to merge over the widget's current settings. Keys must be a subset of the widget's FIELDS schema.

overridesCSS.description: Optional relative path to a CSS file within the theme directory. No url(https://), no @import, no <script>.
